en.title: Structured Preconditioning in Affine-Invariant Geometry: Projection, Certificates, and Kronecker Separation
en.short: When does nearest structured geometry also give the best structured preconditioner?
en.abstract: Nearest structured approximation and best structured preconditioning are distinct matrix problems. For Kronecker positive-definite matrices under the affine-invariant metric, this paper gives their exact relation: a unique projection, certified errors, a marginal-mismatch test, and a dimension-minimal separation showing when projection fails to optimize relative conditioning.

zh.title: 仿射不变几何中的结构化预条件：投影、认证与 Kronecker 分离
zh.short: 最近的结构化几何何时也是最优的结构化预条件器？
zh.abstract: 最近结构化逼近与最优结构化预条件是两个不同的矩阵优化问题。针对仿射不变度量下的 Kronecker 正定矩阵，本文给出二者的精确关系：唯一投影、可认证误差、边缘失配检验，以及一个维数最小的分离构造，说明投影何时不能优化相对条件数。
